business_question: How do online and offline sales channels compare in terms of units sold?
business_context: Leadership wants to understand channel performance and customer buying preferences.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    c.CHANNEL_NAME,
    SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_UNITS_SOLD
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_CHANNEL c
    ON s.CHANNEL_KEY = c.CHANNEL_KEY
GROUP BY c.CHANNEL_NAME
ORDER BY TOTAL_UNITS_SOLD DESC;
